signals.headline: Trump Announces 2-Week Ceasefire with Iran Ahead of Deadline | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Announces 2-Week Ceasefire with Iran Ahead of Deadline | YES | HIGH confidence**  
President Trump announced on Tuesday via Truth Social a conditional 2-week ceasefire with Iran, effective ahead of his 8 p.m. ET deadline, requiring Iran's "COMPLETE, IMMEDIATE, and SAFE OPENING" of the Strait of Hormuz while Pakistan-mediated negotiations continue.[1]

South Korea Holds Rates at 2.5% Amid Rising Inflation Concerns | NO** | **HIGH confidence**
